title: coccocypselum glaberrimum
intro: Coccocypselum glaberrimum, also known as the Yellow Root, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the Yellow Root has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, cough, and digestive issues due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coccocypselum glaberrimum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Coccocypselum glaberrimum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies and supplements.
